title: selaginella boomii
intro: Selaginella boomii, also known as the "black moss" or "spike moss," is a type of ancient, liverwort-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella boomii is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often taken orally to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
